title: Tauragė, Tauragė County — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Tauragė, Tauragė County: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Tauragė is a city in Tauragė County with a population of 22,000. A city in western Lithuania near the Russian exclave of Kaliningrad, known for its castle, the Jūra River, and a growing manufacturing sector.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
